name: Universal — Google Business Profile review → Claude-drafted reply (in inbox for human approve)

parameters.javascript:
=// Only return reviews not yet replied to AND newer than last cron run
$input.first().json.reviews.filter(r => !r.reviewReply && new Date(r.createTime) > new Date(Date.now() - 4 * 60 * 60 * 1000))

values.content:
=You are the founder of {{$json.brand_name}} responding to a Google Business Profile review. Tone: warm, human, sincere — never corporate or scripted.

Review details:
- Reviewer name: {{$json.reviewer_name}}
- Star rating: {{$json.star_rating}}
- Review text: {{$json.comment}}

Draft a reply that:
1. Thanks them by name
2. References ONE specific detail they mentioned (shows you actually read it)
3. If they raised a concern, addresses it directly + apologises if appropriate
4. If 5-star, simple thanks + invites them to bring family/friends in
5. Keeps it under 60 words
6. Signs off as 'Nicholas' or '{{$json.signature}}' — no title

Return ONLY the reply text, ready to paste.

parameters.subject: =📝 Review reply needed: {{$json.brand_name}} — {{$json.star_rating}}⭐ from {{$json.reviewer_name}}
parameters.html:
=

{{$json.brand_name}} — Google review needs reply

Reviewer: {{$json.reviewer_name}} · {{$json.star_rating}} ⭐

Review text:

{{$json.comment}}

Suggested reply (Claude-drafted):

{{$json.draft_reply}}

Action:

  1. Edit if needed
  2. Paste in business.google.com/reviews
  3. Aim to reply within 24h — fastest replies → highest GBP rank uplift

Review URL: open review

nodes.name: Email draft to Nick for review

main.node: Email draft to Nick for review

_meok_notes.purpose: Detect new GBP reviews across all brand profiles, draft a reply via Claude, email it to Nick to approve + paste
_meok_notes.deploy_one_per_brand: Templeman Opticians, Tree-King, Randalls Crane Hire, WCR Grab Hire, iokfarm. Each gets its own GBP location_id + slight tone variation in the prompt.
_meok_notes.expected_volume: 5-15 new reviews/month across 5 brand GBPs combined
_meok_notes.expected_uplift: Replies within 24h drive ~30% GBP rank uplift in 90 days. Claude drafts save Nick ~15 min per reply × 15 reviews/mo = ~3.75h/mo time saved.
